title: OpenAI 一夜之间发布 GPT-5.4，赶出 GPT-5.3 对抗谷歌，治愈 AI 的“说教”倾向
description: GPT-5.3 Instant不追逐基准，专注于修复“聊天失败”：不再容易拒绝回答或滔滔不绝地说教免责声明，幻觉率骤降27%，写作能力飞跃。
titleZh: OpenAI 一夜之间发布 GPT-5.4，赶出 GPT-5.3 对抗谷歌，治愈 AI 的“说教”倾向
titleEn: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5.4 Overnight, Rushes Out GPT-5.3 to Counter Google, Curing AI's "Preachy" Tendencies
descriptionZh: GPT-5.3 Instant不追逐基准，专注于修复“聊天失败”：不再容易拒绝回答或滔滔不绝地说教免责声明，幻觉率骤降27%，写作能力飞跃。
descriptionEn: GPT-5.3 Instant doesn't chase benchmarks, specializes in fixing "chat fails": no longer prone to refusing answers or spouting preachy disclaimers, hallucination rate plummets 27%, and writing ability leaps forward.
